meaning: vt.使膨胀,使得意,使(通货)膨胀,使充气vi.充气,膨胀
examples: The life jacket failed to inflate.
The promotion of a big release can inflate a film's final cost.
The principal effect of the demand for new houses was to inflate prices.
You can begin to implement soft policies that are subtle, where you can slowly inflate.
Even with ObamaCare set to inflate the Medicaid rolls, reimbursement rates are falling further.
